storyBeat: 最後一晚, {catName} 跳上矮牆

questions.sentence: Tonight is the last night I will visit this yard.
questions.question: What did I say tonight is?
questions.explanationZh: last = 最後的。今晚不一樣, 有種要說再見的感覺。

questions.sentence: The wind is dry and the sky is very clear.
questions.question: How is the wind tonight?
questions.explanationZh: dry = 乾燥的。風吹過來不黏不濕, 是秋末的味道。

questions.sentence: I jump on the low wall one more time.
questions.question: What number do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: one more time = 再一次。今晚是「再一次」也是「最後一次」。

questions.sentence: My heart feels a little heavy tonight.
questions.question: How does my heart feel?
questions.explanationZh: heavy = 沉重的。捨不得就會這樣, 胸口有點悶。

questions.sentence: Why is tonight different from other nights?
questions.question: Why is tonight different?
options: it is the last story night
questions.explanationZh: 今晚是最後一次故事夜, 跟其他晚上都不同。

storyBeat: {dogName} 安靜趴下, 風很乾

questions.sentence: {dogName} lies down quietly near my paws.
questions.question: How did {dogName} lie down?
questions.explanationZh: quietly = 安靜地。{dogName} 今晚特別安靜, 好像也知道是最後一夜。

questions.sentence: He does not bark; he just blinks at me.
questions.question: What does {dogName} do with his eyes?
questions.explanationZh: blink = 眨眼。{dogName} 沒叫, 只是慢慢眨眼看我。

questions.sentence: We sit together under the dry wind.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: together = 一起。最後一晚我跟 {dogName} 坐在乾乾的風裡。

questions.sentence: The yard feels peaceful tonight.
questions.question: How does the yard feel?
questions.explanationZh: peaceful = 平靜的。沒有蟲叫, 連風都很輕。

questions.sentence: Why does {dogName} stay so quiet tonight?
questions.question: Why is {dogName} quiet?
options: he senses it is the last night
questions.explanationZh: 狗也會感覺氣氛, {dogName} 知道今晚不一樣, 所以安靜陪著。

storyBeat: 奶奶翻開紅絲線舊書

questions.sentence: Grandma opens an old book with 紅 silk on the cover.
questions.question: What is on the book cover?
questions.explanationZh: silk = 絲。封面是紅色絲線, 看起來很舊很珍貴。「紅」就是 red 的意思。

questions.sentence: This story is from 唐朝, very long ago.
questions.question: When is this story from?
questions.explanationZh: long ago = 很久以前。「唐朝」是中國一個古代王朝, 一千多年前。

questions.sentence: This story is older than Cinderella.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: older than = 比...更老。奶奶說中國版灰姑娘比歐洲版早一千年。

questions.sentence: Grandma's voice is soft and slow.
questions.question: How is Grandma's voice tonight?
questions.explanationZh: soft = 溫柔的, slow = 慢的。最後一夜奶奶讀得特別慢, 像不想讀完。

questions.sentence: What is special about this story compared to Cinderella?
questions.question: What is special about tonight's story?
options: it is much older than Cinderella
questions.explanationZh: 葉限比歐洲灰姑娘早一千年, 是世界上最早的灰姑娘故事。

storyBeat: 父親去世, 葉限孤單

questions.sentence: Ye Xian is a quiet girl who lives in a small village.
questions.question: What kind of girl is Ye Xian?
questions.explanationZh: quiet = 安靜的。葉限不愛說話, 心事都自己藏著。

questions.sentence: Her father died when she was young.
questions.question: What happened to her father?
questions.explanationZh: died = 死了 (die 的過去式)。葉限小時候父親就走了, 只剩她一個。

questions.sentence: She has no brother and no sister of her own.
questions.question: What family word do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: brother = 兄弟。葉限沒有親兄弟姊妹, 只有後母帶來的女兒。

questions.sentence: She feels lonely every day.
questions.question: How does Ye Xian feel?
questions.explanationZh: lonely = 寂寞的。沒有人說話, 屋子裡很空。

questions.sentence: She works hard from morning to night.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: from morning to night = 從早到晚。葉限一整天都在做事, 沒得休息。

questions.sentence: Why is Ye Xian alone in this big house?
questions.question: Why is Ye Xian alone?
options: her father died and she has no real family
questions.explanationZh: 父親去世, 她沒有親人, 後母跟姊姊也不疼她, 所以孤單。

storyBeat: 後母苛刻, 葉限做粗活

questions.sentence: Her stepmother is unkind to her every day.
questions.question: How is the stepmother to Ye Xian?
questions.explanationZh: unkind = 不友善的。後母總是兇葉限, 從不微笑。

questions.sentence: Her stepsister wears a bright 紅 dress and laughs at her.
questions.question: What does the stepsister wear?
questions.explanationZh: dress = 洋裝。「紅」就是 red, 後母的女兒穿紅洋裝, 看起來神氣。

questions.sentence: Ye Xian must carry water from the well.
questions.question: What must Ye Xian do?
questions.explanationZh: carry = 搬、提。葉限每天要提水, 手都磨破了。

questions.sentence: Ye Xian is tired but does not cry in front of them.
questions.question: How is Ye Xian?
questions.explanationZh: tired = 累的。葉限累歸累, 不在後母面前哭, 跟我們的小貓很像。

questions.sentence: She wears thin, old clothes even in winter.
questions.question: What are her clothes like?
questions.explanationZh: thin = 薄的。冬天還穿薄衣服, 後母不給她做新的。

questions.sentence: How does Ye Xian act even when she is treated badly?
questions.question: What is Ye Xian's quiet strength?
options: she runs away to the woods
questions.explanationZh: 葉限被欺負還是默默做事, 是「忍耐 + 不放棄」的人, 跟堅韌的貓一樣。

storyBeat: 池邊金魚, 唯一朋友

questions.sentence: Behind the house there is a small 池 with clear water.
questions.question: What is behind the house?
questions.explanationZh: pond = 池塘。「池」就是 pond, 屋後有個小池子, 水很清。

questions.sentence: In the pond lives a 金魚 with shining gold eyes.
questions.question: What lives in the pond?
questions.explanationZh: fish = 魚, gold = 金色。「金魚」字面就是 gold fish, 葉限這條魚眼睛會發光。

questions.sentence: She feeds the fish small pieces of rice.
questions.question: What food do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: rice = 米飯。葉限把自己的飯分一點給魚, 雖然自己也餓。

questions.sentence: The fish makes her feel less alone.
questions.question: How does the fish make her feel?
questions.explanationZh: less alone = 比較不孤單。有個朋友會聽她說話, 就算只是條魚。

questions.sentence: She talks to the fish every evening.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: every evening = 每個傍晚。葉限每晚下工就去池邊跟魚說話, 是她最開心的時候。

questions.sentence: Why is the fish so important to Ye Xian?
questions.question: Why does the fish matter to her?
options: it is her only friend in a cruel home
questions.explanationZh: 在後母家沒人疼葉限, 這條魚是她唯一聽她說話的朋友, 所以特別重要。

storyBeat: 葉限餵魚, 低聲說話

questions.sentence: Every evening Ye Xian feeds the 金魚 with rice from her own bowl.
questions.question: What does Ye Xian feed the fish with?
questions.explanationZh: feed = 餵。葉限自己的飯都不多, 還是分一點給魚。「金魚」= gold fish。

questions.sentence: She whispers her secrets to the fish.
questions.question: How does she share her secrets?
questions.explanationZh: whisper = 低聲說。葉限不敢大聲, 怕後母聽到, 只在池邊輕輕說。

questions.sentence: Her voice is very gentle by the water.
questions.question: How is Ye Xian's voice?
questions.explanationZh: gentle = 溫柔的。葉限對魚的聲音, 跟對人不一樣, 像在哄小寶寶。

questions.sentence: The fish swims close when it hears her.
questions.question: What does the fish do?
questions.explanationZh: swim close = 游近。魚認得葉限的腳步聲, 一聽就靠過來。

questions.sentence: I tell you everything because you listen.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: because = 因為。葉限對魚說: 我什麼都跟你講, 因為你會聽。

questions.sentence: Why does Ye Xian whisper instead of speak loudly?
questions.question: Why does she whisper?
options: the fish does not like loud sounds
she is afraid her stepmother will hear
questions.explanationZh: 後母如果聽到葉限有朋友, 一定不開心。所以葉限只能低聲。

storyBeat: 魚長大, 月下發亮

questions.sentence: The fish grows bigger and bigger each week.
questions.question: How does the fish grow?
questions.explanationZh: grow bigger = 越長越大。魚一週週變大, 像被愛養著。

questions.sentence: Under the 月光 its scales shine like gold.
questions.question: How do the scales shine?
questions.explanationZh: shine = 發亮。「月光」= moonlight, 魚鱗在月光下像金子。

questions.sentence: The moon is full and very bright tonight.
questions.question: What sky word do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: moon = 月亮。滿月夜, 池水亮亮的, 魚的影子又長又圓。

questions.sentence: Ye Xian looks at the fish with proud eyes.
questions.question: How does she look at the fish?
questions.explanationZh: proud = 驕傲的。葉限把魚當成自己的孩子, 看著牠長大很開心。

questions.sentence: The fish is now too big for any small bowl.
questions.question: Why can't a small bowl hold it now?
options: the fish has grown too big
questions.explanationZh: too big = 太大了。連大碗都裝不下牠, 只能留在池裡。

questions.sentence: What does the shining fish secretly stand for?
questions.question: What does the fish quietly mean?
questions.explanationZh: 魚發光是因為被愛餵大。葉限的希望和溫柔都在魚身上。

storyBeat: 後母穿葉限的衣騙魚

questions.sentence: The stepmother sees the fish from a window.
questions.question: What does the stepmother see?
questions.explanationZh: see = 看見。後母從窗口偷看, 發現池裡有條大魚。

questions.sentence: She borrows Ye Xian's old 衣 to fool the fish.
questions.question: What does she borrow?
questions.explanationZh: borrow = 借。「衣」= clothes。後母穿上葉限的舊衣, 想騙魚靠近。

questions.sentence: She walks slowly to the pond and leans down.
questions.question: What does the stepmother do?
questions.explanationZh: lean = 彎腰、靠。後母假裝葉限, 慢慢走到池邊彎下身。

questions.sentence: Her smile is cold and sharp like a knife.
questions.question: How is her smile?
questions.explanationZh: cold = 冷的, sharp = 銳利的。後母臉上的笑不是真的, 像刀一樣。

questions.sentence: The fish swims up because it trusts the dress.
questions.question: Why does the fish swim up?
questions.explanationZh: trust = 信任。魚以為是葉限, 因為認得那件舊衣。

questions.sentence: Why does the stepmother trick the fish this way?
questions.question: Why must she trick the fish?
options: the fish cannot see in dark
the fish only trusts Ye Xian
questions.explanationZh: 魚只認葉限。後母得騙牠, 不然魚不肯靠近。

storyBeat: 後母殺魚, 煮成晚餐

questions.sentence: She catches the fish with a sharp hook.
questions.question: What does she use to catch the fish?
questions.explanationZh: hook = 鉤子。後母用鉤子把魚拉上來, 魚再也回不去。

questions.sentence: She kills the fish and cooks it for dinner.
questions.question: What does she do with the fish?
questions.explanationZh: kill = 殺, cook = 煮。後母把葉限的朋友變成了晚餐。

questions.sentence: The kitchen smells of fish and smoke.
questions.question: What food do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: fish = 魚。廚房滿是魚和煙的味道, 那是葉限再也不想聞的味道。

questions.sentence: The stepsister eats and laughs, not knowing.
questions.question: How is the stepsister?
questions.explanationZh: laugh = 笑。後姊不知道這是葉限的朋友, 還吃得很開心。

questions.sentence: Ye Xian's bowl tonight is empty as usual.
questions.question: What is in Ye Xian's bowl?
questions.explanationZh: empty = 空的。後母煮了魚卻不給葉限吃, 葉限的碗永遠是空的。

questions.sentence: Why is this dinner so cruel for Ye Xian?
questions.question: Why is the dinner so painful?
options: she lost her only friend tonight
questions.explanationZh: 不是因為餓, 是因為她失去了池邊那個唯一的朋友。

storyBeat: 葉限在空池邊哭

questions.sentence: Ye Xian weeps at the empty 池 in the dark.
questions.question: Where does she weep?
questions.explanationZh: weep = 哭, empty = 空的。「池」= pond, 葉限跪在空空的池邊。

questions.sentence: Her tears fall on the cold stones.
questions.question: Where do her tears fall?
questions.explanationZh: tears = 眼淚。眼淚一滴滴落在池邊的冷石頭上。

questions.sentence: She searches the water but finds nothing.
questions.question: What does Ye Xian do in the water?
questions.explanationZh: search = 尋找。她翻遍池水, 什麼也找不到, 朋友真的不見了。

questions.sentence: Her shoulders shake from crying.
questions.question: Why do her shoulders shake?
questions.explanationZh: shake = 發抖。哭得太用力, 整個肩膀都在抖。

questions.sentence: I have nothing left in this world.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: nothing left = 什麼都沒了。葉限對自己說: 我什麼都沒有了。

questions.sentence: Why is this Ye Xian's saddest moment?
questions.question: Why is this her worst night?
options: her one friend is gone forever
questions.explanationZh: 其他苦她忍得住, 但失去唯一的朋友, 沒人能忍。

storyBeat: 白髮老人現身, 教她埋骨

questions.sentence: An old man with 白髮 appears beside her.
questions.question: Who appears beside her?
options: an old man with white hair
questions.explanationZh: appear = 出現。「白髮」= white hair。一位白髮老人忽然站在她旁邊。

questions.sentence: His eyes are wise and very kind.
questions.question: How are his eyes?
questions.explanationZh: wise = 有智慧的, kind = 親切的。老人的眼神告訴葉限不用怕。

questions.sentence: He says, bury the bones under the cave.
questions.question: What must Ye Xian do with bones?
questions.explanationZh: bury = 埋。老人告訴她: 把魚骨頭埋進洞裡, 它會聽你的願望。

questions.sentence: She listens with hope in her chest.
questions.question: What does she feel in her chest?
questions.explanationZh: hope = 希望。葉限聽著老人的話, 胸口又有一點點光。

questions.sentence: The bones will hear every wish you whisper.
questions.question: What will the bones do?
questions.explanationZh: wish = 願望。魚骨頭會聽她每一個悄悄話。

questions.sentence: Why does the old man appear right when Ye Xian gives up?
questions.question: Why does he come at this moment?
options: help often comes when someone is truly kind
questions.explanationZh: 故事告訴我們: 善良不會白費, 最暗的時候會有人來。

storyBeat: 葉限把魚骨藏在洞穴

questions.sentence: She hides the bones in a small 洞穴 behind the hill.
questions.question: Where does she hide the bones?
questions.explanationZh: hide = 藏。「洞穴」= cave。她偷偷把魚骨帶到山後的小洞穴。

questions.sentence: She covers them with soft brown earth.
questions.question: What does she cover them with?
questions.explanationZh: earth = 泥土。她蓋上一層軟軟的褐色土, 像給魚一個被子。

questions.sentence: She whispers a small wish to the bones.
questions.question: What does Ye Xian whisper?
questions.explanationZh: wish = 願望。她對魚骨頭講出心裡的小心願。

questions.sentence: A faint 金 light comes from the earth.
questions.question: What kind of light comes out?
questions.explanationZh: faint = 微弱的。「金」= gold, 一點點金色光從土裡透出來。

questions.sentence: Please give me one good day.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: good day = 美好的一天。葉限的願望很小: 只要一天好日子。

questions.sentence: Why does Ye Xian wish so quietly?
questions.question: Why is her wish so soft?
options: she has never asked for much before
questions.explanationZh: 葉限從小沒人疼, 不敢要太多, 願望也輕輕的。

storyBeat: 洞節將至, 魚骨給金衣

questions.sentence: The village 洞節 is coming next week.
questions.question: When is the cave festival?
questions.explanationZh: festival = 慶典。「洞節」= cave festival, 下週是村裡最熱鬧的日子。

questions.sentence: The stepmother says, you cannot come with us.
questions.question: What does the stepmother say?
questions.explanationZh: cannot = 不能。後母又一次把葉限關在家。

questions.sentence: She runs to the cave and begs the bones.
questions.question: How does Ye Xian ask the bones?
questions.explanationZh: beg = 求。葉限跑去洞穴跪在魚骨前, 第一次大聲說出願望。

questions.sentence: A 金 robe appears in her hands like magic.
questions.question: What appears in her hands?
questions.explanationZh: robe = 長袍。「金」= gold。手裡突然出現一件閃亮的金袍。

questions.sentence: The bones give her tiny gold slippers too.
questions.question: What else do the bones give her?
questions.explanationZh: slipper = 拖鞋, tiny = 小巧的。連一雙小巧的金鞋都有。

questions.sentence: What does the magic really show about Ye Xian?
questions.question: What does the magic say about her?
questions.explanationZh: 葉限對魚的好, 終於有回報。善良不會白費。

storyBeat: 葉限戴金履赴宴跳舞

questions.sentence: She wears the 金 slippers and walks into the lantern light.
questions.question: What does she wear into the light?
questions.explanationZh: slipper = 拖鞋。「金」= gold, 她穿著一雙會發光的金鞋。

questions.sentence: Hundreds of 燈籠 hang above the cave square.
questions.question: What hangs above the square?
questions.explanationZh: lantern = 燈籠。「燈籠」= lantern, 廣場上掛了好幾百盞燈籠。

questions.sentence: She dances slowly under the bright lanterns.
questions.question: What does Ye Xian do at lanterns?
questions.explanationZh: dance = 跳舞。她從沒跳過舞, 卻在燈籠下慢慢轉圈。

questions.sentence: People stop to watch her in silence.
questions.question: How do the people watch?
questions.explanationZh: silence = 安靜。整個廣場都停下來看她, 沒人敢出聲。

questions.sentence: Tonight I am not invisible at all.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: invisible = 看不見的。葉限想: 今晚我終於被看見了。

questions.sentence: Why does Ye Xian dance even though she is shy?
questions.question: Why does she dance?
options: the magic gave her one brave night
she wants to find a husband
questions.explanationZh: 今晚是她唯一可以被當人看的夜, 她不想浪費。

storyBeat: 國王見她, 葉限奔逃落履

questions.sentence: The 國王 of a nearby kingdom sees her dance.
questions.question: Who sees her dance?
options: the king of a nearby kingdom
questions.explanationZh: king = 國王。「國王」= king。旁邊王國的國王正好在場。

questions.sentence: His heart is caught by her quiet grace.
questions.question: What catches his heart?
questions.explanationZh: grace = 優雅。國王第一眼就被她安靜的優雅迷住。

questions.sentence: She runs as fast as her small feet allow.
questions.question: How does Ye Xian leave the festival?
questions.explanationZh: run = 跑。葉限怕被認出, 拔腿就跑。

questions.sentence: One slipper drops on the stone path behind her.
questions.question: What drops on the path?
questions.explanationZh: drop = 掉。跑太快, 一隻金鞋從腳上掉下來。

questions.sentence: The king picks up the slipper with both hands.
questions.question: How does the king pick it up?
questions.explanationZh: both hands = 雙手。國王用雙手捧著, 像捧著寶物。

questions.sentence: Why does Ye Xian run away from the king?
questions.question: Why does she run?
options: she fears the magic will end at midnight
she wants to win a race
questions.explanationZh: 魔法只能撐一晚, 她怕被看穿真實的身分。

storyBeat: 國王搜村, 一履配一足

questions.sentence: The king searches every 村 in his land.
questions.question: What does the king search?
questions.explanationZh: search = 尋找。「村」= village。國王挨家挨戶找。

questions.sentence: He looks for the foot that fits the slipper.
questions.question: What is he looking for?
options: the foot that fits the slipper
questions.explanationZh: fit = 合適。哪雙腳穿得進那隻小金鞋, 哪雙就是她。

questions.sentence: Many women try the slipper but it is too small.
questions.question: How is the golden slipper?
questions.explanationZh: small = 小。每個試的人腳都太大, 鞋穿不下。

questions.sentence: The stepsister pushes hard but cannot fit.
questions.question: How does the stepsister try?
questions.explanationZh: push = 推、塞。後姊用力塞腳, 還是不合。

questions.sentence: Then a quiet girl in old clothes steps forward.
questions.question: Who steps forward last?
options: a quiet girl in old clothes
questions.explanationZh: step forward = 走上前。最後出來的是穿舊衣的葉限。

questions.sentence: Why does the slipper only fit Ye Xian's foot?
questions.question: Why does only she fit?
options: the slipper was made by her bones' magic
the king gave her a hint
she has the smallest feet ever
questions.explanationZh: 鞋是魚骨頭的魔法做的, 本來就只屬於葉限一個人。

storyBeat: 國王迎娶葉限, 後母伏石

questions.sentence: The king asks Ye Xian to marry him.
questions.question: What does the king ask?
questions.explanationZh: marry = 結婚。國王請葉限做他的王后。

questions.sentence: She says yes, but only after she thinks for one quiet moment.
questions.question: How does she answer?
questions.explanationZh: quiet moment = 一個安靜的片刻。葉限想了想, 才點頭。

questions.sentence: The stepmother is buried under heavy 石頭.
questions.question: What action do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: bury = 埋。「石頭」= stones。後母最後被一堆石頭壓住, 不能再害人。

questions.sentence: The fish bones grow quiet inside their cave.
questions.question: How do the bones become?
questions.explanationZh: quiet = 安靜。願望都實現了, 魚骨頭從此安靜地睡在洞裡。

questions.sentence: Ye Xian gives food to every poor child in her new home.
questions.question: What does she do as queen?
questions.explanationZh: give food = 給食物。葉限沒忘記餓的滋味, 當王后後常幫窮孩子。

questions.sentence: Why does this ending feel fair, not just happy?
questions.question: Why does the ending feel fair?
options: the kind got kindness back and the cruel got stopped
questions.explanationZh: fairness = 公平。對人好的有好報, 害人的被擋下來, 這就是公平。

storyBeat: 田螺姑娘: 漁夫拾螺帶回家

questions.sentence: Grandma starts a new short tale about a 田螺.
questions.question: What is the new tale about?
questions.explanationZh: snail = 蝸牛 / 螺。「田螺」= river snail, 田裡撿到的螺。

questions.sentence: A lonely fisherman picks up a big snail by the river.
questions.question: Who picks up the snail?
questions.explanationZh: fisherman = 漁夫, lonely = 寂寞的。一位寂寞的漁夫在河邊撿到大田螺。

questions.sentence: He brings it home and puts it in a clay jar.
questions.question: What container do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: jar = 罐子。漁夫把田螺放進陶罐, 蓋上蓋子。

questions.sentence: His small house feels less empty tonight.
questions.question: How does his house feel?
questions.explanationZh: less empty = 比較不空。有了田螺陪, 屋子裡好像多了點什麼。

questions.sentence: Why does the fisherman keep the snail instead of eating it?
questions.question: Why does he keep the snail?
options: it is too pretty and rare to eat
questions.explanationZh: 漁夫覺得這隻田螺特別漂亮, 捨不得吃, 想留下。

storyBeat: 田螺姑娘: 螺中走出煮飯姑娘

questions.sentence: Next morning hot rice is already on his table.
questions.question: What is on his table?
questions.explanationZh: rice = 米飯。漁夫一早起來看到熱飯已經煮好。

questions.sentence: He hides behind the door and watches in silence.
questions.question: Where does he hide?
questions.explanationZh: hide = 躲。他躲在門後想看誰來煮飯。

questions.sentence: A kind girl steps out of the shell.
questions.question: What does the kind girl exit?
questions.explanationZh: shell = 殼。從田螺的殼裡走出一位善良的姑娘。

questions.sentence: She sweeps the floor with quiet care.
questions.question: How does she sweep?
questions.explanationZh: sweep = 掃, quiet care = 靜靜地用心。她默默把地板掃乾淨。

questions.sentence: What is the small lesson of the snail maiden?
questions.question: What lesson does Grandma whisper?
options: kindness returns when no one asks
hot rice is the best food
questions.explanationZh: 對人對動物善良, 不一定當下被看到, 但會用別的方式回來。

storyBeat: 嫦娥奔月: 后羿求得仙藥

questions.sentence: Long ago there were ten hot suns in the sky.
questions.question: How many suns were in the sky?
questions.explanationZh: ten = 十。古時候天上有十個太陽, 地都快烤焦了。

questions.sentence: Houyi shoots down nine of them with his bow.
questions.question: How many suns does he shoot down?
questions.explanationZh: shoot down = 射下。后羿用弓箭射掉九個, 留一個給地球。

questions.sentence: The gods give him a small bottle of medicine.
questions.question: What do the gods give Hou Yi?
questions.explanationZh: medicine = 藥。神為了謝謝他, 給了一瓶仙藥。

questions.sentence: He gives it to his wife Chang'e to keep.
questions.question: Who keeps the medicine?
questions.explanationZh: wife = 妻子。后羿把仙藥交給妻子嫦娥保管。

questions.sentence: Why don't they drink the medicine right away?
questions.question: Why do they wait?
options: the gods told them not to
they love earth and each other too much
questions.explanationZh: 他們捨不得對方, 也不想離開人間。

storyBeat: 嫦娥奔月: 嫦娥飛上月宮

questions.sentence: A bad man comes to steal the medicine one night.
questions.question: Who comes to steal it?
questions.explanationZh: steal = 偷。一個壞人趁后羿不在家來搶仙藥。

questions.sentence: Chang'e drinks the medicine to keep it safe.
questions.question: Why does Chang'e drink it?
questions.explanationZh: safe = 安全。嫦娥怕仙藥被搶走, 自己喝下去。

questions.sentence: Her body slowly flies up to the bright moon.
questions.question: What place do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: moon = 月亮。她的身體變輕, 慢慢飄到月亮上。

questions.sentence: She lives alone with a small jade rabbit.
questions.question: Who lives with her?
questions.explanationZh: rabbit = 兔子, jade = 玉。月亮上有一隻玉兔陪著她。

questions.sentence: Why does the moon look so sad on some nights?
questions.question: Why is the moon sometimes sad?
options: the gods turn off the light
Chang'e misses Houyi and the earth
questions.explanationZh: 月亮看起來孤單, 是因為嫦娥在上面想著地球上的人。

storyBeat: 奶奶合書, 這是最後一夜

questions.sentence: Grandma closes the old red book very softly.
questions.question: How does Grandma close the book?
questions.explanationZh: softly = 輕輕地。奶奶合書的動作慢得像捨不得。

questions.sentence: She says, that is the end of our eight nights.
questions.question: What does Grandma say?
options: the end of our eight nights
questions.explanationZh: end = 結束, eight nights = 八個夜晚。奶奶說: 我們的八夜講完了。

questions.sentence: {dogName} looks up at me with round eyes.
questions.question: What body word do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: eyes = 眼睛。{dogName} 抬頭看我, 圓滾滾的眼睛裡有疑問。

questions.sentence: My ears feel a little heavy too.
questions.question: How do my ears feel?
questions.explanationZh: heavy = 沉重的。連耳朵都垂下來一點, 像在說: 我也捨不得。

questions.sentence: Grandma's hand rests on the book for one long moment.
questions.question: Where does her hand rest?
questions.explanationZh: rest = 停放。奶奶的手在書上多停了一會, 也在告別。

questions.sentence: She blows out the candle but the moon is still bright.
questions.question: What is still bright?
questions.explanationZh: blow out = 吹熄, bright = 亮。蠟燭滅了, 但月亮還亮著。

questions.sentence: I do not know if I will come back tomorrow.
questions.question: When might {catName} return?
questions.explanationZh: tomorrow = 明天。我不確定明天還會不會跳上這面矮牆。

questions.sentence: The yard smells faintly like jasmine.
questions.question: What does the yard smell like?
questions.explanationZh: jasmine = 茉莉花。最後一夜的院子有淡淡的茉莉香。

questions.sentence: I want to remember every word she said.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: remember = 記得。我想把奶奶說過的每個字都記在身上。

questions.sentence: Why does Mochi feel uncertain tonight?
questions.question: Why is Mochi uncertain?
questions.explanationZh: 故事夜結束了, 我不知道沒有故事的日子會長什麼樣。

storyBeat: {dogName} 問: 葉限她怕嗎?

questions.sentence: {dogName} looks at me with round eyes and asks: was Ye Xian scared?
questions.question: What does {dogName} ask?
questions.explanationZh: scared = 害怕的。{dogName} 想知道葉限那麼苦會不會怕。

questions.sentence: I think for a moment and answer: yes, she was scared.
questions.question: What do I say?
questions.explanationZh: 我老實回答, 葉限當然會怕, 跟我們一樣會怕的人才是真的人。

questions.sentence: But she still went to the festival even with shaking hands.
questions.question: What did Ye Xian do scared?
options: she still went to the festival
questions.explanationZh: shaking = 顫抖的。怕歸怕, 葉限還是出發了, 這就是勇敢。

questions.sentence: Being brave is not the same as not being scared.
questions.question: What word means scared but doing it?
questions.explanationZh: brave = 勇敢的。重點: 勇敢 ≠ 不害怕, 是「害怕但還是去做」。

questions.sentence: I wish I had a magic fish bone too.
questions.question: What do I wish for?
questions.explanationZh: wish = 希望。我也想要一根能許願的魚骨頭, 流浪貓也會累的時候。

questions.sentence: If I had a wish, what would I want most?
questions.question: If {catName} could wish, for what?
questions.explanationZh: 我的願望比較小, 不要金子不要王冠, 只想要一個能停下來的地方。

questions.sentence: {dogName} licks my paw very gently.
questions.question: What does {dogName} do?
questions.explanationZh: lick = 舔。{dogName} 用最溫柔的方式安慰我, 像在說: 我們也是家。

questions.sentence: My eyes get wet but I do not cry out loud.
questions.question: What happens to my eyes?
questions.explanationZh: wet = 濕的。眼眶濕了但不出聲, 愛哭鬼貓還是有她的尊嚴。

questions.sentence: Maybe the stories are my magic bones.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: maybe = 也許。我懂了: 奶奶說的每個故事, 就是我的魚骨頭, 想起來就有力氣。

questions.sentence: What did I really learn from Ye Xian's story?
questions.question: What is the lesson I keep?
options: go even when you are scared
find a king to save you
questions.explanationZh: 葉限教我的不是「等王子」, 是「會怕也要走出門」。這是貓和女孩共同的事。

storyBeat: 畢業: 八個夜晚, 八個故事, {catName} 記得

questions.sentence: Match each story word with its chapter.
questions.question: Match the word to the chapter it came from.
questions.explanationZh: 四個字代表八個夜晚的回聲。Ch3 醜小鴨記得 ugly→beautiful, Ch4 龜兔的 slow and steady, Ch5 駱駝的 hump, Ch6 Baba Yaga 的 chicken legs — 全都還在你心裡, 不會忘。

questions.sentence: Grandma closes the book and says that was our eighth night.
questions.question: How many nights of stories did we have?
questions.explanationZh: eight = 八。八個夜晚 = 八個故事, 一晚一個, 不多不少。

questions.sentence: The yard smells like jasmine and the moon hangs low.
questions.question: What does the yard smell like?
questions.explanationZh: jasmine = 茉莉花。夏末的院子有茉莉香, 跟 Ch1 的雨味、Ch6 的冬風一樣, 是季節的記號。

questions.sentence: I jump off the wall slowly tonight, not fast like before.
questions.question: How do I jump off tonight?
questions.explanationZh: slowly = 慢慢地。前七晚我都是輕輕一躍就走, 今晚走得慢, 想多看一眼。

questions.sentence: Which story will you carry with you most?
questions.question: Which story do you keep closest?
options: the one with the loudest fight
the one that made me feel less alone
the one with the most magic
the one with the biggest king
questions.explanationZh: 這題沒有錯答案。每個學生會記住不同的故事。最重要的不是哪個對, 是「你還記得」。明天還是會有夜晚, 我可能會回來。也可能不會。但故事已經在你身上了。
